title: TelemetryEvent

id.description: Stable URN identifying this telemetry event (urn:srcos:telemetry:<id>).

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

sessionRef.description: URN of the AgentSession that emitted this event.

eventType.description: Free-form string identifying the category of telemetry (e.g., 'tool.call', 'token.limit').

capturedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this event was captured.

description: A structured telemetry or diagnostic log event emitted by an agent session, with severity classification and linkage back to the originating session.
